caption: The video appears to be a news segment from PlusTV Africa, focusing on political analysis related to Nigeria. The screen is divided into two sections: on the left, there is an image of Olusola Oyekanmi, identified as a Political Analyst from Lagos, who is participating via phone. On the right, a man in a suit and tie is shown, likely the host or another commentator, discussing the topic "Nigeria Needs Me - Bola Tinubu." The background features a professional studio setup with red and purple graphics, emphasizing the political nature of the discussion. The video encourages viewers to subscribe and follow their content on YouTube, indicating it is part of a series called "Plus Politics." The overall tone suggests a serious and analytical approach to current political events in Nigeria.
